<doctag><page_header><loc_176><loc_13><loc_471><loc_18>Noise Suppression Products/EMI Suppression Filters > Chip EMIFIL ® Inductor Type > Chip Ferrite Beads</page_header>
<page_header><loc_228><loc_20><loc_273><loc_27>Data Sheet</page_header>

<text><loc_36><loc_37><loc_135><loc_42>Continued from the preceding page.</text>
<section_header_level_1><loc_36><loc_45><loc_101><loc_51>n Notice (Rating)</section_header_level_1>
<text><loc_35><loc_53><loc_235><loc_82>In operating temperatures exceeding +85°C, derating of current is necessary for chip Ferrite Beads for which rated current is 1200mA or over. Please apply the derating curve shown in chart according to the operating temperature.</text>
